name: Databutton
description: Databutton — AI-assisted app development platform where agents help build and iterate on full-stack web applications.

seo.title: Databutton — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Databutton: Databutton — AI-assisted app development platform where agents help build and iterate on full-stack web applications.

when_to_use: Building internal AI-powered data apps without a full stack
Deploying Python-based data dashboards to the web instantly
Prototyping LLM-integrated analytics tools with minimal code
Creating shareable data apps for non-technical stakeholders

pros: AI agent builds full-stack apps end-to-end
Good for internal tools and prototypes
cons: Generated apps hard to port off-platform
Complex logic still needs manual code
review.verdict: Fast prototyping studio; weaker as a long-term production platform.
review.best_for: PMs and solo founders validating ideas before engineering spin-up
review.not_for: Engineering orgs needing code ownership and clean exportability
